items.translated_title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect
items.content: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role in the future of computing and AI.
